title: Kamasers Analysis: A Multi-Vector DDoS Botnet Targeting Organizations Worldwide

        $h1 = "Dd305f7f1131898c736c97f43c6729bf57d3980fc269400d23412a282ee71a9a" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "F6c6e16a392be4dbf9a3cf1085b4ffc005b0931fc8eeb5fedf1c7561b2e5ad6b" ascii nocase
